title: Battlezone 98 Redux

notes:
The game works fine with the mission I've played using vanilla Proton 3.16, apart from two minor inconveniences:

1) The BZ98R game launcher box doesn't display any images
|
2) Having Caps Lock on causes the radar to switch when pressing any button on the keyboard
title: Battlezone 98 Redux

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 With Max-Q Design
notes: Now runs perfectly! Played through several missions and everything worked fine! Loving this oldschool game now that everything works...despite the config menu on first launch not showing images. Other than that, when the game itsself loads, everything is playable!
